_comment: Copy this file to dit.config.json (same folder as index.html) to persist BYOK keys across sessions. dit.config.json is git-ignored and never bundled into dist/ or a release zip (INV-R8-3) — only this .example file is. Requires opening DIT via a local HTTP server (e.g. scripts/start-dit.ps1); a plain file:// open cannot read it and falls back to pasting the key each session.
